hints.boards: Kanban boards — daily work and columns.
hints.reports: Org-wide BI with charts and Explain (AI) on each metric.
hints.okrs: Objectives and key results by quarter.
hints.templates: Public template showcase and one-click import.

theme.cycleTooltip: Appearance: {current}. Click to cycle system, light, and dark.

rateLimitAbuse.title: Abuse — rate limit
rateLimitAbuse.subtitle: Grouped by IP or user when the global API limit returns 429 (Mongo with TTL).
rateLimitAbuse.empty: No blocks recorded in this period.

templates.title: Templates & showcase
templates.subtitle: Import columns, labels, and automations without cards. Premium uses a 70/30 creator/platform split.
templates.aiHint: Describe what your team does — we suggest columns, labels, and automation ideas.
templates.aiPlaceholder: e.g. B2B CS team running onboarding, QBRs, and renewals…

exportModal.title: Publish as template
exportModal.hint: Exports columns, automations, and labels (no cards). Visible in the showcase.
exportModal.revenueHint: Premium templates use a 70% creator / 30% platform split (commercial setup).

reports.title: Self-service BI with AI narrative
reports.subtitle: Live dashboard aggregating boards in your organization. Use Explain on each chart to generate an executive narrative.
reports.emptyChart: Nothing to plot for this chart yet.
reports.copilotHint: Tip: weekly throughput and created vs. done use Copilot history on boards. Without MongoDB or Copilot usage, these may stay at zero.

hints.leadTime: Lead time for completed cards is estimated from card creation to last board update (approximation).
hints.heatmap: Color reflects risk exposure: red = more critical; green = healthier. Based on Flux-Board heuristics.
hints.velocity: Requires an owner (or assignee) field on cards; otherwise the chart may be empty.

proactive.title: Proactive AI
proactive.subtitle: Daily anomaly checks (throughput, WIP, lead time, OKRs, due dates) with z-scores vs. baseline. Alerts are stored here.
proactive.noMongo: Connect MongoDB to enable history and automatic alerts.
proactive.neverRun: No runs recorded yet. Configure cron at /api/cron/anomaly-check (x-cron-secret header).
proactive.cronHint: The daily job (e.g. Vercel Cron) calls GET /api/cron/anomaly-check with the same secret as your other crons. Weekly emails can include an optional summary of these alerts.

hero.description: Flux-Board brings together professional Kanban, day-to-day insights, and portfolio visibility—for teams that need predictable delivery and speed in conversations with customers and leadership.
hero.quickLine: Quick team adoption · Responsive experience · Grows with discovery, deals, and routines built into the flow

why.heading: Built for teams that live by delivery and outcomes
why.description: More than a pretty Kanban: an operational layer that connects day-to-day work with how the business reads progress—from each card to portfolio view.

commercialPace.title: Kanban that matches commercial pace
commercialPace.description: Clear columns, visible priorities, and a workflow built for sales, operations, and product—without losing sight of what actually closes deals.

insights.title: Intelligence on the board, not in stray spreadsheets
insights.description: Daily insights, richer context on cards, and a foundation ready for prioritization and recommendations—fewer alignment meetings, more execution.

executiveView.title: Executive and portfolio view in one place
executiveView.description: Portfolio metrics on boards, exports when you need them, and paths to briefings—the same source of truth for the field and leadership.

platform.heading: Everything already in Flux-Board
platform.description: Capabilities that reflect today's product—insights, context, portfolio, discovery, and routines—in one cohesive experience.

dailyInsights.name: Daily insights
dailyInsights.detail: Read board progress to keep cadence and spot bottlenecks early.

contextOnCards.name: Context on cards
contextOnCards.detail: Structured information per card for faster, more consistent decisions.

executiveBrief.name: Executive brief
executiveBrief.detail: Support for distilling what matters for management and strategic follow-up.

portfolioAndMetrics.name: Portfolio and metrics
portfolioAndMetrics.detail: Roll-up indicators and exports when you need to present results.

discoveryAndDeals.name: Discovery and deals
discoveryAndDeals.detail: Room to explore hypotheses and track opportunities with live context.

routinesAndAlerts.name: Routines and alerts
routinesAndAlerts.detail: Routine reminders woven into the flow so nothing critical slips through.

how.heading: From chaos to cadence in three steps
how.description: Lean onboarding, strong defaults. Your team adopts in hours—and keeps the rhythm for weeks.

step1.title: Centralize the flow
step1.text: Create boards aligned to your funnel or ops model. Everyone sees the same priority picture.

step2.title: Enrich with context
step2.text: Use descriptions, per-card context, and insights to turn tasks into informed decisions.

step3.title: Scale with clarity
step3.text: Metrics, exports, and an executive view support growth without losing execution standards.

audiences.heading: Who gets the most from it

sales.title: Sales and customer success
sales.text: Visible pipeline, obvious next steps, and communication aligned with the customer.

operations.title: Operations and projects
operations.text: Predictable delivery with explicit prioritization and less cross-team rework.

leadership.title: Leadership and PMO
leadership.text: Fast portfolio reads and briefing support without juggling a dozen tools.

cta.heading: Bring clarity to how your team works
cta.description: Try a solid commercial foundation: modern visuals, features aligned with sales and operations day-to-day, and room to grow with AI and integrations.

footer.copyright: © {year} Flux-Board — Organize the flow. Ship what matters.

login.subtitle: Organize the flow. Ship what matters.

errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 4 characters.

remember.register: Keep me connected after sign up

descriptions.step1: Choose a template and a name. You can skip if you want.
descriptions.step2: Drag the columns to adjust the flow. You can skip.
descriptions.step3: One card is enough to get started. You can also skip.

placeholders.cardDescriptionOptional: What needs to happen? (keep it short)

preview.title: Template preview
preview.description: When you continue, we'll create your board with these columns and you can reorder in the next step.

step2.reorderDescription: Your cards will be created using the order/columns from this template.

step3.title: First card
step3.description: Create a simple item to get started. You can skip and go straight to the board.

filters.searchPlaceholder: Search by name or board ID...

empty.noBoards: No boards yet. Click "{newBoardName}" to create.
empty.noResults: No boards found for the applied filters.

capabilityStrip.title: Product map
capabilityStrip.subtitle: Where each capability lives — most of them are inside a board.

triage.name: Smart Triage
triage.hint: Flux Forms: public form that creates cards and classifies with board context.

copilot.name: Central AI
copilot.hint: Board copilot: chat with tools over the Kanban (panel on screen).

timeline.name: Timeline
timeline.hint: On the board, switch to Timeline view (due dates on a timeline).

portal.name: Client portal
portal.hint: Client portal in the header: read-only link for external stakeholders.

automations.name: Flux Automations
automations.hint: Automations modal: triggers and actions on cards and columns.

reports.name: Flux Reports
reports.hint: Reports in the menu: org-wide dashboard and AI narrative per chart.

anomalyAlerts.title: Anomaly notifications
anomalyAlerts.hint: Configure email when the monitor flags risks on this board (minimum severity, types, extra recipients). Org-wide alerts use org admin emails or environment variables.
anomalyAlerts.emailEnabled: Send email for alerts on this board
anomalyAlerts.kindsHint: Empty = all types. Uncheck to restrict.
anomalyAlerts.recipientsHint: Optional. If empty, we use organization administrators.

automations.title: Flux Automations — internal rules
automations.hint: Pick a trigger and an action. Time-based rules (stuck, due date, completion %) are evaluated when the automation cron runs (daily on Vercel Hobby; upgrade to Pro for per-minute scheduling).

triggers.card_stuck_in_column: Card stuck in column for N days

automations.nlHint: Write in Portuguese or English. AI maps your text to Flux’s technical format using this board’s columns.
automations.nlPlaceholder: E.g. when a card stays more than 5 days in Proposal, notify the owner and set priority to Urgent.
automations.nlAddRule: Add this rule to the list
automations.nlTooShort: Write at least one full sentence.
automations.nlApplied: Rule added to the list (save to persist).

toasts.saveError: Failed to save changes. Check your connection and try again.

portal.title: Client portal — external visibility
portal.hint: Share project status without granting access to the internal board. The portal is read-only.
portal.columnsHint: All selected = show every column that has items.
portal.cardIdsHint: One ID per line. If empty, all cards from the columns above are included.

smartEnrich.busy: Generating suggestions from your title and board…
smartEnrich.error: Could not fetch suggestions right now.
smartEnrich.dueSimilar: Based on average lead time from {count} similar completed card(s).
smartEnrich.dueNone: No similar completed cards; adjust the date manually if needed.

toasts.missingTitleAndDescription: Please provide a title and a description to generate context.

logs.contextTimeout: Timed out while generating AI context.
logs.unableToGenerateContext: Unable to generate AI context. Adjust the title/description and try again.

description.edit: Adjust identification, content, and status — changes reflect on the board right away.
description.new: Set the essentials now; you can refine title, description, and links later.

identification.title: Identification and column
identification.description: Unique ID and current position in the board flow.

content.title: Main content
content.description: Title on the board and description in blocks — use the AI button when you want suggestions based on what you already wrote.

statusDue.title: Status and due date
statusDue.description: Priority, work stage, and target completion date.

dependencies.title: Dependencies
dependencies.description: Cards that must be done before this one (blocked by).

labels.title: Labels
labels.description: Select existing tags or create new ones for this board.

links.title: Links
links.empty: No links. Click "Add link" to include one.

blockedBy.label: Blocked by
blockedBy.hint: Select predecessor cards. Links appear on the Timeline.

tooltips.trigger: Generate AI context (based on Title and Description)

log.title: AI connectivity log
log.emptyMessage: The log will appear here once generation starts.

result.autoFilledText: The Title and Description were filled automatically.

docRefs.title: Linked documents
docRefs.description: Attach knowledge-base docs for card context.

history.title: Movement and automations
history.description: Data stored on the card about the column and recent automation runs.
history.noEnteredAt: No recorded date for entering this column.

aiTab.title: AI context
aiTab.description: Generate title, description, and enrichment from what you already wrote.
aiTab.hint: Use when the card already has a title and description. The panel shows progress and results.
aiTab.needTitleDesc: Fill in title and description on the Details tab to enable generation.

title.replace: Import {count} cards? Replaces the current ones.

description.replace: Confirm to replace the board's current content.
description.merge: It will update {existingCount} existing card(s) and add {newCount}.

dailyDelete.title: Delete this Daily AI history summary?

serpro.name: SERPRO (Federal Revenue)
serpro.description: Validation of tax status and the CNPJ with the Federal Revenue Service, through a certified partner, ensuring compliance and the integrity of the registration for business decisions.

susep.name: SUSEP
susep.description: Query to the insurance sector regulatory body to verify the broker's status and regularity, ensuring only licensed brokers operate on the platform.

serasa.name: SERASA
serasa.description: Credit analysis and financial health of the Insured and Policyholder through a specialized partner, supporting underwriting decisions and risk mitigation.

executiveView.title: Production Map — Flux-Board
executiveView.description: A consolidated view of what's already in production: business lines and integrated validations (SERPRO, SUSEP, SERASA) performed in each workflow.

integrations.title: Integrated validations
integrations.description: Automated checks performed by the platform to ensure compliance and support underwriting.

inProduction.title: Records in Production
inProduction.description: Roles by team and business line, with the applied validations.

entry.description: Paste the daily transcript (or attach a .txt/.md file) to generate a practical view of the next steps.

generating.title: Generation in progress. Follow the Status tab.
generating.description: You can close and reopen this modal without losing the current progress.

transcribing.title: Transcribing audio with Whisper…
transcribing.description: Your file is sent securely for transcription. Review and edit the text below before generating the summary.

entry.transcriptPreviewHint: Edit the text if needed before generating insights and cards.
entry.transcriptPlaceholder: Ex: yesterday we finished... today we're going to... blocker on...

log.title: AI connectivity log
log.emptyMessage: The log will appear here once generation starts.

filters.searchPlaceholder: Search in summary, context, and lists...

tooltips.rewritten: Content rewritten and structured by AI from the transcript.

card.noneYet: No cards created for this summary yet.

history.emptyNoMatches: No summary found with the provided filters.
history.emptyNoSummaryYet: There is no saved summary for this board yet.

error.noCreateItems: No items in "Create" to turn into cards.

both.title: {count} card(s) created successfully.
both.description: {existingCount} item(s) already existed on the board and were only flagged.

none.title: No new cards created.
none.description: All suggested items already exist on the board.

warning.noClipboardSupport: Your browser does not support automatic copy.

error.noTranscript: Provide or attach the daily transcript.
error.title: Error while generating the summary with AI.

generate.timeout: Timed out while generating the Daily AI.

transcribe.done: Transcription received. Review the text below.

success.heuristic: Summary structured without effective AI usage (heuristic mode).

error.timeout: Timed out while generating the Daily AI.
error.error: Error while generating summary with AI.

timeline.emptyTitle: No cards with a due date
timeline.emptyHint: Set a completion date on cards to see them here. Board filters apply to this view as well.
timeline.barAria: Due date for {title}: {date}. Drag to change or use arrow keys.

nlq.label: Smart board query
nlq.placeholder: e.g. urgent cards with no owner · throughput last week
nlq.aria: Natural language query about this board
nlq.cleared: NLQ filter and metric panel cleared.
nlq.hint: In Copilot, use /query plus your question. Recent queries appear in the list while typing.

wipRisk.title: WIP risk by column
wipRisk.emptyMessage: No critical bottlenecks (>= {minItems} items in progress).

screenReaderInstructions.draggable: Drag and drop cards using the keyboard. Use Tab to focus a card. Press Enter/Space to start dragging. Use the arrow keys to switch between columns/positions, then press Enter/Space to drop.
